SYSTEM SECURITY ARCHITECTURE

Access to the production environment is restricted to authorized personnel only.
All users must authenticate using MFA before accessing any production systems.
The application is deployed on AWS with network ACLs restricting traffic.
All data stored in the database is encrypted at rest using AES-256.
Security audits are conducted quarterly by an independent third party.
The system depends on the corporate SSO infrastructure for authentication.
Backups are performed daily and retained for 90 days.
